text: The transformer architecture was introduced in the paper Attention is All You Need.
Convolutional neural networks are commonly used for image classification tasks.
The stock market closed higher on Friday after a strong jobs report.
Reinforcement learning from human feedback is used to align language models.
The central bank raised interest rates for the third consecutive quarter.
Attention mechanisms allow models to focus on relevant parts of the input sequence.
Inflation dropped to its lowest level in two years according to new data.
GPT models are pretrained on large corpora using next token prediction.
The company reported record profits driven by strong consumer demand.
Mixture of experts models route tokens to specialized subnetworks during inference.
